Contact

Reach the right person faster.

Choose the inbox that matches your question so the rescue team can respond as clearly as possible.

Email general inbox Donate
Adoption Adopt@underdogheroes.org Fostering Foster@underdogheroes.org Donations Donations@underdogheroes.org General and volunteer info@underdogheroes.org

Donation questions

For mailed checks, tax receipts, or donation questions, email Donations@Underdogheroes.org.

Underdog Heroes

Dog rescue for abused, neglected, and overlooked dogs who deserve a fighting chance.

Adopt: Adopt@underdogheroes.org Foster: Foster@underdogheroes.org Volunteer: info@underdogheroes.org Instagram
